title: Worker now calls Queue
summary: Adds a new call edge from worker.ts into queue.ts so the worker can push items itself. Queue itself is unchanged but now participates in the runtime trajectory.

claims.statement: worker.ts reaches Queue.enqueue via a new call.
claims.detail: A cross-file call hunk should appear linking worker → queue.

claims.statement: Queue code is unchanged but surfaces as propagation context.
claims.detail: Queue entities should appear as extra_entities or propagation_edges on the flow.
